title: ScanRunReport
description: Full report for one repo scan (a `scan_runs` row): the consolidated repo score, the by-kind tally, and every capability discovered in the repo with its own independent score + findings. Backs GET /api/v1/scans/runs/<run_id> and the `/scans/<id>` page. Wire-only (never persisted as its own table).

id.description: Server-assigned scan_runs UUID. Keys the `/scans/<id>` page + the SSE channel.

githubUrl.description: Canonical GitHub repo URL scanned. Null for uploaded artifacts (`sourceKind = 'upload'`).

repoAggregateScore.description: Consolidated repo score — the rounded mean of the per-capability aggregate scores.

repoTier.description: 5-tier badge for the consolidated repo score.

kindTally.description: Count of discovered capabilities by kind, e.g. `{"skill": 3, "hook": 2, "mcp_server": 1}`.

capabilityCount.description: Number of capabilities discovered in the repo (always ≥1 — the whole-repo fallback).

capabilities.description: Each capability discovered in the repo, with its own independent score + findings.

scannedAt.description: When the repo scan completed (UTC ISO-8601).

rubricVersion.description: Rubric git SHA active for this scan.

latencyMs.description: Wall-clock latency of the repo scan in milliseconds.

source.description: Scan trigger source (submission / ingestion / rescan_drift / rescan_appeal).

status.description: Run lifecycle state. A pending/running run renders the live progress board.

refSha.description: Resolved HEAD SHA of the scanned ref. Null until the engine resolves it (and always null for uploads).

visibility.description: Listing posture of the run. `unlisted` runs are reachable only via their capability URL and never appear in any public feed.

sourceKind.description: Provenance of the scanned bytes — `github` or `upload`.

artifactSha256.description: Content hash of the scanned artifact snapshot (`scan_runs.content_hash_sha256`). The durable identity of an uploaded artifact. Null for legacy runs.

uploadedFilename.description: Original filename of the uploaded artifact (e.g. `SKILL.md`, `my-skill.zip`). Null for GitHub scans.

expiresAt.description: Auto-expiry timestamp for an unlisted run (90 days). Null for public runs.

shareUrl.description: The capability URL `/scans/r/<token>` — present only on the unlisted detail response served via the token route. NEVER present in any list payload.

capabilityRow.description: One discovered capability (a catalog item) within the repo scan.

kind.description: Capability taxonomy — drives the row's type glyph.

name.description: Capability display name (frontmatter / manifest name, or repo name for a whole-repo capability).

componentPath.description: Relative path of the scanned capability subtree (null / empty = whole-repo).

aggregateScore.description: This capability's independent weighted aggregate score.

scanId.description: The `scans` row UUID for this capability.

findingsSummary.description: Per-severity finding counts for the collapsed row summary.

findings.description: This capability's findings (one per rule fire), shown when the row expands.

finding.description: Inline mirror of finding.schema.json. Keep in sync with the source schema.
